title: Unimaginative Utilities
description: This modpack optimize minecraft-client and adds some tweaks and utilities
body:
## Unimaginative Utilities 
### Info:
- It's a optimized modpack for client with some utilities and tweaks for survival
- This modpack doesn't add some new features in gameplay and you can play on vanilla-server
### Extra version:
- In the extra version there are more mods that may be useless or be cheats on some servers. Use this version carefully. **Tweakeroo, TweakerMore, TweakMyClient and OhMyMinecraftClient have been added to it**
#### Also you can try [ Unimaginative Speed](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unimaginative-speed)
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- ### Libraries:
	- [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed
	- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - library for essential hooks and interoperability mechanisms for Fabric mods
	- [**Fabric Language Kotlin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
	- [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
	- [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods
	- [**malilib**](https://github.com/maruohon/malilib) - Library mod used by masa's LiteLoader mods. It contains some common code previously duplicated in most of the mods, such as multi-key capable keybinds, configuration GUIs etc
	- [**YetAnotherConfigLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft
    - [**Forge Config API Port**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Forge's whole config system provided to the Fabric ecosystem. Designed for a multiloader architecture.

- ### Optimization:
    - [**EBE**](https://github.com/MeeniMc/EnhancedBlockEntities/releases/tag/v0.8.rc.1%2B1.19.4) - Reduce FPS lag with block entities, as well as customize them with resource packs
	- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Modern rendering engine and client-side optimization mod for Minecraft
	- [**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine**](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft
	- [**DashLoader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader) - This mod accelerates the Minecraft Asset Loading system by caching all of its content, This leads to a much faster game load
	- [**Dynamic FPS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Dynamic FPS automatically reduces the speed at which Minecraft renders when it's not focused (to 1 FPS) or hidden (no renders at all)
	- [**EntityCulling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible
	- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - This mod reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways
	- [**ForgetMeChunk**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgetmechunk) - Mod that prevents light map unloads on the client, this eliminates the fps drops caused by crossing certain chunk borders
	- [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
	- [**Indium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Indium is an addon for the rendering optimisation mod Sodium, providing support for the Fabric Rendering API
	- [**kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcecloseworldloadingscreen) - Instantly closes the loading terrain screen on world changing and drastically reduces the resource pack loading screen duration
	- [**Krypton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
	- [**Ksyxis**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis) - Speed up your world loading by not loading nearby chunks every time.
	- [**Language Reload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
	- [**More Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance
	- [**Reese's Sodium Options**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
	- [**Seaborgium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/seaborgium) - A slight rendering optimization mod for Minecraft, increasing the performance of the vanilla HUD
	- [**Smooth Boot**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric) - Smooth Boot makes Minecraft load smoother and possibly faster by editing some parameters related to executors.
	- [**Sodium Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) -  in addition to providing some features such as visual bug fixes and other performance options that are not yet available on Sodium.
	- [**Starlight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Fabric mod for rewriting the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors.
    - [**FastAnim**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastanim) - Speeds up entity animation calculations!

- ### Graphics
	- [**CIT Resewn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs)
	- [**Custom Entity Models**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) - An implementation of custom entity models heavily based off of Optifine format that aims to achieve feature parity with Optifine's custom entity models
	- [**3D Skin Layers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d
	- [**Bobby**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance
	- [**Boosted Brightness**](https://modrinth.com/mod/boosted-brightness) - Set your brightness beyond default levels
	- [**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs
    - [**Particle Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-tweaks) - Substantially improves particles
    - [**Chat Animation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) - Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation

- ### Utils:
	- [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
    - [**Autoclicker RinF**](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoclicker-rinf-uwu) - Autoclicker for farm
	- [**BetterF3**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD
	- [**Bossbar Stack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bossbar-stack) - Very simple mod that stacks all bossbars with the same name together
	- [**Chat Heads**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - This clientside mod adds player heads next to chat messages, as seen on the screenshot above
	- [**Chat Patches**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches) - A Minecraft Fabric client-side mod that touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible!
	- [**ClickThrough**](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough) - Click through signs and item frames to chests
	- [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures
	- [**EMI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - A featureful and accessible item and recipe viewer
	- [**EMI Trades**](https://modrinth.com/mod/emitrades) - An addon for EMI adding Villager Trade support
	- [**Freecam**](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - This mod allows you to control your camera separately from your player
	- [**IBE Editor**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ibe-editor) - A simple GUI mod to edit an item, a block or an entity in your current world
	- [**InvMove**](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - Adds the ability to walk around while in inventories
	- [**Item Scroller**](https://github.com/maruohon/itemscroller) - A client-side mod that adds several ways of moving items in inventory GUIs
	- [**Litematica**](https://github.com/maruohon/litematica) - Litematica is a client-side schematic mod for Minecraft, with also lots of extra functionality especially for creative mode (such as schematic pasting, area cloning, moving, filling, deletion)
	- [**MiniHUD**](https://github.com/maruohon/minihud) - MiniHUD is a client-side information and overlay rendering mod for Minecraft
	- [**No Chat Reports**](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - This mod strips cryptographic signatures that since 1.19 are attached to every message sent in the chat
	- [**Screenshot to Clipboard**](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) - Screenshots taken are copied to the clipboard
	- [**ShulkerBoxTooltip**](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory
	- [**ViaFabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric) - Allows to connect to older servers with older versions
	- [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked
	- [**Xaero's World Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap
	- [**Better Statistics Screen**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful
	- [**Zoomify**](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod with infinite customizability
    - [**Reimagined World Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-world-menu) - Completely re-design the Create World menu.
    - [**NBT Autocomplete**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-autocomplete) - Adds suggestions for NBT tags in commands
    - [**Organizable Play Screens**](https://modrinth.com/mod/organizable-play-screens) - Organize your worlds and servers with folders in the play screens
    - [**Better Ping Display**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list
    - [**Better Log4j Config**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-log4j-config) - A simple mod to automatically reconfigure Log4j to improve the formatting of log messages
    - [**Stendhal**](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal) - client-side Fabric mod offering new and enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat.
    - [**Game Menu Remove GFARB**](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamemenuremovegfarb) - Remove the "Give Feed Back" and "Report Bugs" buttons from the game menu.
    - [**Inventory Tabs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-tabs-updated) - Client side mod to access nearby blocks without leaving your inventory
    - [**SwingThrough**](https://modrinth.com/mod/swingthrough) - Allows targeting (and interacting with and attacking) living entities through transparent blocks like grass, crops, and flowers.
    - [**Clean Tooltips**](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-tooltips) - A small mod improving Tooltips by creating a clean and consistent look!
    - [**ScreenFX**](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenfx) - A client-side, resource pack compatible, quality of life fabric mod for changing overlays and screen effects
    - [**Quick Hotkeys**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quick_hotkeys) - Adds useful QOL hotkeys, such as an elytra swap hotkey and quick totem equip hotkey
    - [**Xaero Zoomout**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaero-zoom-out) - Reduces the minimum zoom of Xaero's World Map from 0.0625x to 0.0025x, so you can see everything!
    - [**Better Sign Edit**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-sign-edit) - Edit signs only when sneaking and don't save changes by pressing Escape
    - [**Pickup Notifications**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pickup-notifications) - Show popup notifications when you pick up items.
### Unused optimization mods
- ### Shaders:
    - [**Complementary Reimagined**](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - High quality, well optimized shader pack that aims for perfection

- Why is there no **Exordium**

    - [**Exordium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) isn't compitable with custom gui like minimap and MiniHud
</details>


<details>
<summary>Extra Version</summary>


### Added:
- [**MagicLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/magiclib ) - A library of versatile mod dependencies
- [**Camera Utils**](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils) - Helpful camera utilities
- [**Custom Scoreboard**](https://modrinth.com/mod/customscoreboard) - Scoreboard customization mod for Fabric
- [**Dark Loading Screen**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Makes the loading screen darker
- [**DStatHud**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dstathud) - Fabric mod that shows download and upload speed in F3 menu
- [**Dynamic Crosshair**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - A mod that hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context
- [**Eating Animation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - A mod that adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items
- [**In-Game Account Switcher**](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher) - This mod allows you to change your logged in account in-game, without restarting Minecraft
- [**Inventory HUD+**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge) - Adds your main inventory, potion effects and your equipments to your HUD. And few other features.
- [**Ngrok LAN**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ngrok-lan) - Share your singleplayer world as a server for you and your friends across the globe, in one click!
- [**Nametag Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nametagtweaks) - A small QOL mod that lets you change the look of nametags
- [**NoNarrator**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nonarrator) - A simple mod that disables the narrator feature in Minecraft
- [**Panorama**](https://modrinth.com/mod/swd-panorama) - Take panoramic screenshots in Minecraft
- [**Recipe Unlocker**](https://modrinth.com/mod/recipes) - Unlocks all the crafting table recipes.
- [**WorldEdit**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit) - In-game Minecraft map editor - build bigger things more quickly!
- [**WorldEdit CUI**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldeditcui-fabric) - A graphical user interface for WorldEdit
- [**Tweakeroo**](https://github.com/maruohon/tweakeroo) - A client-side Minecraft mod that adds various "tweaks" (= usually small-ish individual features)
- [**TweakMyClient**](https://github.com/Hendrix-Shen/Tweak-My-Client/releases) - Add something interesting tweaks
- [**Oh My Minecraft Client**](https://github.com/plusls/oh-my-minecraft-client) -  Add something interesting tweaks too
- [**TweakerMore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakermore) - A collection of client-side tweak kits to enhance your Minecraft game experience. Tweak Minecraft and beyond!
</details>


Also I follow updates and releases of new mods, so I will continue to add some mods
If you have any questions, bugs, suggestions you can ask me in discord: **_fedor_f**
